message:
fix(release): pin frankensqlite to c3995c8 (fixes btree + mvcc + pager compile errors)

Rev f09815f fixed the mvcc lifecycle.rs Arc<HashMap> mismatch but
still had missing foldhash dep in fsqlite-btree. Rev c3995c8 includes:
- eff25b1: add missing foldhash dependency to btree Cargo.toml
- 8ca2f71: commit pending PageCache refactor
- c3995c8: fix PageCache::new call site

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -35,7 +35,7 @@ notify = "*"
